diagnosis: Autism spectrum disorder with sensory processing needs
communicationAbilities: Uses short phrases, picture choices, and yes/no responses. Benefits from wait time and visual supports.
fineMotorGoals: Improve pincer grasp for classroom tools
Cut along curved lines with adapted scissors
Write first name with consistent letter formation
speechGoals: Use a five-word request with visual support
Answer who/what/where questions after a story
sensoryNeeds: Access to calm corner after unexpected changes
immediateObjectives: Use a first/then board during writing block
Request a break using a picture card
Complete hand washing sequence with two prompts or fewer
longTermObjectives: Independently use visual schedule across the school day
Communicate needs using speech, AAC, or picture exchange
Complete self-care routines with minimal adult prompting
